Packages

Two epic ways to party

Choose the hosted experience that suits your group best.

Premium Experience

ONYX

£1502 hoursUp to 6 players

A premium hosted gaming experience for smaller groups who want a mix of console play, racing and VR.

ONYX is designed for a focused, high-energy party with a varied mix of shared gaming moments.

Included

  • PlayStation and Nintendo gaming
  • Racing simulator
  • VR hardware
  • Displays
  • Party host/operator
  • Free digital invitation
Suited to
Best for smaller groups who want everyone close to the action with a premium mix of experiences.
Age/group guidance
Suitable for groups where the games and experiences can be selected around the players.
Room guidance
Works best with enough room for displays, a racing position and safe VR movement.
  • Optional add-ons can be discussed during enquiry.

Tell us about your room and group and we’ll confirm the best setup.

Big Party

JADE

£1502 hoursUp to 10 players

A hosted big-party setup built around multiplayer gaming across multiple stations.

JADE is built for larger groups, helping more players join in across multiple gaming stations.

Included

  • Multiplayer gaming across multiple stations
  • Displays
  • Party host/operator
  • Free digital invitation
Suited to
Best for birthdays and group events where easy rotation and shared multiplayer are priorities.
Age/group guidance
Game choices can be guided by the group and the style of party you want.
Room guidance
Works best in a clear room with space for multiple stations, displays and guest movement.
  • Optional add-ons can be discussed during enquiry.

Tell us about your room and group and we’ll confirm the best setup.

Available with both packages

  • Additional time

    Extend the hosted session if availability allows.

    BothPrice confirmed during enquiry

  • Additional equipment

    Extra displays or equipment may be possible depending on the venue.

    BothPrice confirmed during enquiry

Package-specific options

  • Additional gaming station

    Ask about adding another station where room and power allow.

    JADEAsk for options

  • Selected specialist experience

    Ask about adding selected specialist experiences to suit the group.

    ONYXAsk for availability

Next step

Ready to plan your party?

Reserve now when you know what you need, or ask us anything before deciding.

Reserve your date

Tell us when and where the party is taking place, and we’ll help confirm the right package and hosted setup.

Ask us before deciding

Tell us about package choice, venue space, player numbers, add-ons, accessibility or setup and we can help you plan the right fit.

  • Package choice
  • Venue or available space
  • Player numbers
  • Add-ons
  • Accessibility or setup
  • Another question

Common package questions

ONYX is a premium experience for up to 6 players and includes PlayStation and Nintendo gaming racing and VR. JADE is designed for larger groups of up to 10 players playing across multiple stations.

ONYX accommodates up to 6 players. JADE accommodates up to 10 players.

No. We deliver the equipment set everything up and host the gaming session.

The best layout depends on the venue and package. Send us a photograph or approximate room dimensions and we’ll help confirm a suitable arrangement.

Yes. Games can be selected around the group and the type of experience you want.

For booking enquiries, a preferred date or venue detail can provide enough context.

Email Party.LAN directlyhello@partylan.co.uk

Thanks — your enquiry has been sent.

We’ll get back to you as soon as possible.

Hosted gaming parties, delivered to your venue.
